name: student-financial-rights
description: Financial aid, student loan rights, tuition payment plans, education tax benefits, and workforce training funding. For students navigating the financial maze of education.
source: Liberation Labs mutual aid knowledge base

triples.subject: Pell Grant
triples.object: repayment — it is a grant, not a loan, for undergraduate students with demonstrated financial need

triples.subject: FAFSA (Free Application for Federal Student Aid)
triples.object: Pell Grants, federal loans, work-study, and many state/institutional aid programs — file annually even if you think you won't qualify

triples.subject: WIOA (Workforce Innovation and Opportunity Act)
triples.object: tuition, books, supplies, transportation, and childcare for approved training programs — apply through local American Job Center

triples.subject: WIOA and Pell
triples.object: students can receive both WIOA funding AND Pell Grants simultaneously — WIOA covers what Pell doesn't

triples.subject: income-driven repayment (IDR)
triples.object: percentage of discretionary income (5-20% depending on plan) — remaining balance forgiven after 20-25 years of payments

triples.subject: SAVE plan
triples.object: calculates payments on income above 225% FPL, forgives interest not covered by payments, and forgives balances after 10 years for those who borrowed ≤$12,000

triples.subject: economic hardship deferment
triples.object: temporary suspension of federal loan payments when income is below 150% FPL or during unemployment — interest may still accrue on unsubsidized loans

triples.subject: in-school deferment
triples.object: while enrolled at least half-time in an eligible program — no payments required, subsidized loan interest covered by government

triples.subject: Public Service Loan Forgiveness (PSLF)
triples.object: remaining federal loan balance after 120 qualifying payments while working full-time for government or nonprofit employers

triples.subject: Lifetime Learning Credit
triples.object: tax credit of 20% of first $10,000 in tuition expenses — available for undergraduate, graduate, and professional development courses

triples.subject: American Opportunity Tax Credit
triples.object: up to $2,500/year for first 4 years of undergraduate education — 40% is refundable even with zero tax liability

triples.subject: student loan borrower
triples.object: loan servicer transfer notification, accurate payment history, and clear disclosure of repayment options — file CFPB complaint if rights violated

triples.subject: default on federal loans
triples.object: wage garnishment, tax refund seizure, damaged credit, and loss of future federal aid eligibility — but Fresh Start program can restore eligibility

triples.subject: loan rehabilitation
triples.object: making 9 agreed-upon payments within 10 months — removes default status from credit report, restores federal aid eligibility

triples.subject: consolidation
triples.object: multiple federal loans into one with a weighted average interest rate — can also exit default and provide access to IDR plans

triples.subject: Total and Permanent Disability discharge
triples.object: federal student loans for borrowers who are totally and permanently disabled — apply with documentation from VA, SSA, or physician

triples.subject: closed school discharge
triples.object: federal loans if your school closed while you were enrolled or within 180 days of withdrawal — automatic for some closures

triples.subject: Satisfactory Academic Progress (SAP)
triples.object: continued financial aid eligibility — appeal if you fail SAP due to documented circumstances (illness, family emergency, etc.)

triples.subject: scholarship displacement
triples.object: institutional aid is reduced because you received outside scholarships — ask the financial aid office about their policy before accepting outside awards

triples.subject: financial aid appeal
triples.object: special circumstances (job loss, medical expenses, family changes) that aren't reflected in FAFSA data — always appeal rather than accepting an insufficient package
